items.title: Draymond Green did not make an All-Defensive team this season after receiving 8 First Team votes and 24 Second Team votes @nbcswarriors.bsky.social
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Draymond Green did not make an All-Defensive team this season after receiving 8 First Team votes and 24 Second Team votes @nbcswarriors.bsky.social  

His 40 voting points were 10 behind Dyson Daniels’ 50, who had the least points for the Second Team
